docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-12-2017 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-12-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-12-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BARBARA SIMON WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,059.40 FILED BY HUNT, MARK DBA M & L CONSTRUCTION AS TO DEFENDANT SIMON, BARBARA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-12-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUNT, MARK DBA M & L CONSTRUCTION IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SIMON, BARBARA BARBARA J. RANDOLOPH 1989 TRUST THE PARTIES AGREE TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO ADD A DEFENDANT, BARBARA J. RANDOLPH 1989 TRUST, ON WHOSE BEHALF DEFENDANT, BARBARA SIMON, A PROFESSIONAL TRUSTEE AND TRUSTEE OF THE BARBARA S. RANDOLPH 1989 TRUST, WAIVES NOTICE, SERVICE OF PROCESS AND ALL IRREGULARITIES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF HUNT, MARK DBA M & L CONSTRUCTION
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $97.50 SERVED NOV-16-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SIMON, BARBARA
